_description: All media attachments across all cultural entries. Audio and images now — video reserved for Phase 2. Every uploaded file is a separate document in this collection. The parent entry stores a denormalised cover_image_url pointing to the primary image document's storage_url to avoid an extra read on list views.

media_type.note: video_future is reserved in schema — not yet supported in the upload UI

mime_type.note: Must match the accepted formats listed under format_constraints

media_role.note: Determines how the media is displayed and labelled in the entry view and org media library

storage_path.note: Full Firebase Storage path — required for deletion. Pattern: cultural_media/{org_id}/{entry_id}/{filename}

thumbnail_url.note: Smaller version for list/grid display. Same as storage_url for images below 200kb. Waveform PNG for audio if generated.

language.note: For audio: the language spoken or sung in the recording

is_primary.note: Exactly one media document per entry should have is_primary: true. This document's storage_url is denormalised into the parent entry's cover_image_url. For audio entries with no image, the primary audio has is_primary: true.

subject_notes.note: Who or what is depicted. Consent notes if identifiable people appear.

consent_on_file.note: Must be true before any media featuring identifiable people is set to public visibility

location_lat.note: GPS latitude if the photograph was taken at a specific site

recorded_date.note: ISO 8601 date string — when the media was captured. e.g. '2025-03-15'

visibility.note: Can be set more restrictively than the parent entry but never more permissively. A sealed entry cannot have public media.

updated_at.note: Set when caption or visibility is edited

audio.recommended_format: MP3 at 128kbps minimum for speech. WAV for archival quality where storage allows.
audio.upload_ui_note: Show duration and file size in the upload preview. Warn if duration exceeds 30 minutes.

image.recommended_format: JPEG for photographs. PNG for diagrams, patterns, and illustrations.
image.upload_ui_note: Show a preview before confirming. Warn if the image is below 800px on the short side — it will look poor in the grid view.

video_future.status: reserved — not yet enabled in upload UI
video_future.note: Schema field exists. Upload UI will surface this in Phase 2.

cover_image.position: Hero — full width at top of entry view
cover_image.label: Cover

documentation_image.position: Gallery — appears in entry image carousel
documentation_image.label: Documentation

artefact_image.position: Gallery — close-up of the object or craft
artefact_image.label: Artefact

pattern_detail.position: Gallery — zoomed pattern detail for clothing/craft
pattern_detail.label: Pattern Detail

audio_primary.position: Pinned player at top of audio section
audio_primary.label: Primary Recording

audio_phrase.position: Audio section — displayed inline with phrase text
audio_phrase.label: Phrase Recording

audio_interview.position: Audio section — labelled as spoken interview
audio_interview.label: Interview

storage_path_convention.note: Filenames are sanitised on upload — spaces replaced with underscores, special characters stripped. Original filename is preserved in the filename field of the document.

audio_primary.caption: Isukuti ensemble — Kakamega Cultural Festival, March 2025
audio_primary.caption_english: Full three-drum isukuti ensemble performing the interlocking polyrhythmic pattern
audio_primary.subject_notes: Seven-member Kakamega Cultural Ensemble. Written consent held by org.

cover_image.caption: Wachezaji wa isukuti wakicheza ngomani — Kakamega, 2025
cover_image.caption_english: Isukuti drummers performing at Kakamega cultural grounds, 2025
cover_image.subject_notes: Drummers are named members of the Kakamega Cultural Ensemble. Consent on file.

process_image.caption: Mkono wa mfumaji akipitisha uzi — Mombasa, 2025
process_image.caption_english: Weaver's hands passing the weft thread through the warps on a traditional pit loom — Mombasa, 2025
process_image.subject_notes: Master weaver Bwana Hamisi Ali. Verbal consent given, written consent on file.

indexes.note: Get all audio or all images for a single entry
Resolve cover quickly without reading all media docs
Org media library screen — Images tab and Audio tab
Filter by role — e.g. all process images for an entry
Audit — flag any public media without consent on file
